overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit futuristic city street at night in a cyberpunk game environment. The player navigates past vehicles at an intersection, walks along an elevated sidewalk overlooking billboards, and crosses a street while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas pass by.

events.description: black futuristic sedan drives through the intersection from right to left
camera turns right onto the sidewalk away from the intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection watching the car pass, then turning right onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan with glowing accents driving through the rainy intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rainy urban intersection at night, dominated by a commercial building with a glowing 'FOODSCAPE' neon sign. A black futuristic car drives past on the wet asphalt as the camera turns right onto the sidewalk, passing under an elevated highway structure.

events.description: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella passes close to camera, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk next to a metal fence, observing the city below

notable_agents.action: person carrying a glowing red umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: black metal railing fence with horizontal bars overlooking lower level
large illuminated advertisement screen visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated sidewalk bordered by a metal fence on the right, overlooking a lower district with glowing digital billboards visible through the rain and fog. Several pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas walk past, and the wet concrete reflects the streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with bus stop and palm trees

events.description: passing illuminated bus stop shelter with digital advertisement display

agents.ego_description: walking past a concrete building and illuminated bus stop, continuing along the rain-soaked sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated transit shelter with digital advertisement screen and bench

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past a modern concrete building that now occupies the right side of the frame. The metal fence ends, and the camera passes an illuminated bus stop shelter with glowing advertisements before approaching the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk

events.description: beginning to cross the street at the crosswalk while traffic waits at the red light
continuing across the wide intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, navigating through the wet intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: car waiting at the traffic light with headlights on

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with illuminated green walk indicator
low-rise commercial structure with green neon signage

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street intersection with a green walk signal, the camera enters the crosswalk and begins crossing the wide asphalt road. A car waits at the traffic light on the left, and palm trees line the opposite side of the street as the crossing continues through the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk district that shifts from a dense commercial intersection to an open street crossing. It begins at a wet urban junction dominated by a glowing FOODSCAPE sign, moving past a futuristic black car as the camera turns right under the shadow of an elevated highway. As the path leads onto an elevated sidewalk, the view expands to reveal a lower district filled with digital billboards and pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas through the fog. The scene then shifts past a modern concrete building and a glowing bus stop shelter before the metal fencing ends, opening the way toward another intersection. Finally, the camera enters a crosswalk under a green signal, moving across the wide asphalt road past a waiting car toward palm trees lining the opposite side of the street in the heavy rain.
